Convenience Store.title: Rob's Liquor
Convenience Store.description:
- **Average Take:** $100
- **Cash Registers:** 1

Low payout, difficult clerk and a speedy response from the police. Escape vehicle necessary.

Convenience Store.title: 24/7 Supermarket
Convenience Store.description:
- **Average Take:** $700
- **Cash Registers:** 2

Police arrive quickly - find a place to hide on the beach.

Convenience Store.title: 24/7 Supermarket
Convenience Store.description:
- **Average Take:** $1100
- **Cash Registers:** 2

Police arrive quickly and you have no time for the clerk's attitude. Grab the money and run for the beach.

Convenience Store.title: Limited LTD Gasoline
Convenience Store.description:
- **Average Take:** $1200
- **Cash Registers:** 2

Run for the hills!

Convenience Store.title: 24/7 Supermarket
Convenience Store.description:
- **Average Take:** $600
- **Cash Registers:** 2

The desert is your friend when the police arrive.

Convenience Store.title: Limited LTD Gasoline
Convenience Store.description:
- Average Take: $500
- Cash Registers: 2

Don't shoot the second register before the clerk has finished bagging the first. The creek behind the store leads to a bridge.

Convenience Store.title: 24/7 Supermarket
Convenience Store.description:
- **Average Take:** $950
- **Cash Registers:** 2

Run into the wilderness to escape the police.

Convenience Store.title: 24/7 Supermarket
Convenience Store.description:
- **Average Take:** $1050
- **Cash Registers:** 2

Police respond very quickly - an escape vehicle/aircraft is necessary.

Convenience Store.title: Rob's Liquor
Convenience Store.description:
- Average Take: $250 - $700
- Cash Registers: 1

River is useful for getaway if no vehicle is available.

Convenience Store.title: Limited LTD Gasoline
Convenience Store.description:
- Average Take: $800 - $1,200
- Cash Registers: 2

If escaping on foot, the bridge over the canal is useful.

Convenience Store.title: 24/7 Supermarket
Convenience Store.description:
- **Expected Take:** $600 - $800
- **Cash Registers:** 2

Police respond slowly and you have time to climb the wall around the back.

Convenience Store.title: 24/7 Supermarket
Convenience Store.description:
- **Average Take:** $400
- **Cash Registers:** 2

Low payout but easy getaway.

Convenience Store.title: Limited LTD Gasoline
Convenience Store.description:
- Average Take: $1,000
- Cash Registers: 2

If escaping on foot, jump a fence and hide behind a residential house.

Convenience Store.title: Rob's Liquor
Convenience Store.description:
- Average Take: $725
- Cash Registers: 1

Alley system is useful for hiding out when the police arrive. Otherwise, an escape vehicle is necessary.

**Note:** Cashier is usually armed

Convenience Store.title: Limited LTD Gasoline

Flight School.title: LSI Flight School
Flight School.description:
Unlocks after the [Friends Reunited](https://gta-5-map.com?locationIds=13985) mission. Earn a medal in each of the trials for progress towards 100% completion.

**Trials:**
- Training Take Off
- Runway Landing
- Inverted Flight
- Knife Flight
- Flat Hatting
- Touch Down
- Loop the Loop
- Helicopter Course
- Helicopter Speed Run
- Skydiving
- Drop Zone
- Earn Your Wings

Parachuting.description: The parachute is just outside the Maze Bank building. A helicopter will take you to the top.

*Note* All discounts are for the character you did the Shooting Range with!

Hidden Package.title: Hidden Package #12

**Tip:** If you're running out of air, swap to another character and back again to get a full oxygen bar.

**Bug:** Recently, hidden packages haven't been appearing properly. If you don't see it, quick save and re-load the game and it will be there.

On the roof of the little tower overlooking Vinewood Lake. Helicopter is easiest way to access - there's no access to the roof from the from the barricaded walkway leading to the tower.

_Tip: Use a motorcycle, ATV, bike, or small car as seen in the screenshot and push it up against the tower to climb up. Cars like that can spawn in the neighbourhood to the south._

Spaceship Part.title: Spaceship Part
Spaceship Part.description:
Next to the blue dumpster behind Hangar #1 at the back of LS International Airport.

*Note: If you don't own a hangar with the chosen character, you will receive an immediate wanted level.*

- **Recommended Vehicle:** Helicopter, Car

Spaceship Part.title: Spaceship Part
Spaceship Part.description: On a small island in the long water pool running along the right side of the 7th Hole fairway of the LS Golf Club.

Spaceship Part.title: Spaceship Part

Spaceship Part.description: Found underwater, among a rusted iron boat structure, just south-east of the Merryweather HQ dock.

Stunt Location.title: Stunt Jump #31
Stunt Location.description:
Use a broken concrete ramp to jump west across Buccaneer Way.

Stop as soon as you land so you don't die running into barriers and other objects.

**Preferred Vehicle:** Fast Car / Fully Tuned Bike

Stunt Location.title: Stunt Jump #41
Stunt Location.description:
Jump from the black and white ramp and land in the small parking lot.

- **Preferred Vehicle:** Sports Car

Stunt Location.title: Stunt Jump #42
Stunt Location.description:
Jump the sign that looks like an upwards bending piece of road. It's an advertisement for an airline.  You'll launch off the ramp and land on top of a multi-story car park.

- **Preferred Vehicle:** Sports Car

Stunt Location.title: Stunt Jump #11
Stunt Location.description:
Try to land in the intersection of the streets below without hitting a tree or any traffic.

- **Preferred Vehicle:** Any

Stunt Location.title: Stunt Jump #9
Stunt Location.description:
Jump off the Freeway and don't hit any vehicles.

- **Preferred Vehicle:** Bike or Sports Car.

Stunt Location.title: Stunt Jump #15
Stunt Location.description:
Jump from the ramp in the pagoda at the intersection of Vespucci Boulevard and Decker Street and land on Rockford Drive.

- **Preferred Vehicle:** Any

Stunt Location.title: Stunt Jump #34
Stunt Location.description:
Use trailer ramp to jump across the canal.

Stop as soon as you land so you don't run into the trailers or building.

**Preferred Vehicle:** Bike

Stunt Location.title: Stunt Jump #27
Stunt Location.description:
Use the construction dump ramp next to the guard post to jump over the LSI runway fencing. Be ready for a 3-star wanted level if you haven't purchased a hangar.

**Preferred Vehicle:** Bike

Stunt Location.title: Stunt Jump #19
Stunt Location.description:
Jump from the sand dune in the construction site to the alley.

- **Preferred Vehicle:** Bike

Stunt Location.title: Stunt Jump #5
Stunt Location.description:
Use the rock ramp to jump over the ravine.

- **Preferred Vehicle:** Bike

Stunt Location.title: Stunt Jump #29
Stunt Location.description:
Jump from the sand dune to the landing strip.

- **Preferred Vehicle:** Any

Stunt Location.title: Stunt Jump #3
Stunt Location.description:
Use the flat rock as a ramp and land on the dirt road. (Works both ways).

- **Preferred Vehicle:** Any

Stunt Location.title: Stunt Jump #12
Stunt Location.description:
Jump from the house driveway to lighthouse on the island.

- **Preferred Vehicle:** Anything you're not too fond of. You'll probably lose it.

Stunt Location.title: Stunt Jump #23
Stunt Location.description: Jump from the ramp on Panorama Drive and land in (or near) an empty pool on the west side of the Motel.

Stunt Location.title: Stunt Jump #13
Stunt Location.description:
Start the jump off the Senora Freeway and land and over the prison fences - gather lots of speed.

**Preferred Vehicle:** Bike

Note: You will get a 3-star wanted rating.

Stunt Location.title: Stunt Jump #1
Stunt Location.description:
Dirt ramp over road (land on the ditch to complete it successfully). 

- **Preferred Vehicle:** Any

Stunt Location.title: Stunt Jump #2
Stunt Location.description: On the highway overpass. Jump from the northern off ramp to the southern off ramp, while heading south.

Stunt Location.title: Stunt Jump #4
Stunt Location.description:
Jump across the broken bridge.

- **Preferred Vehicle:** Any

Stunt Location.title: Stunt Jump #6
Stunt Location.description:

- **Preferred Vehicle:** Bike

Stunt Location.title: Stunt Jump #7

**Preferred Vehicle:** Motorbike

Stunt Location.title: Stunt Jump #10

- **Preferred Vehicle:** Any

Stop as soon as you land so you don't die running into barriers and other objects.

**Preferred Vehicle:** Fast Car / Fully Tuned Bike

Stunt Location.title: Stunt Jump #35
Stunt Location.description:

Don't take the ramp too fast and be careful of A/C units and vents on the roof when landing.

Use trailer ramp to jump onto the roof of the warehouse.

Take the ramp as fast as possible or you will slam into the side of the building.

*NOTE: This can be a glitchy jump and not always mark as completed, even when you land on the roof cleanly. Keep trying until you get the completion notice.*


**Preferred Vehicle:** Fast Car / Fully Tuned Bike

Stunt Location.title: Stunt Jump #37

Use trailer ramp to jump onto the La Puerta/Elysian Fields Freeway ramp.

Take the trailer ramp as fast as possible or you won't clear the side of the freeway. When using a bike, stop quick after landing so you don't die in traffic.

*NOTE: The wheels MUST touch the asphalt first - the freeway side barriers don't count.*

- **Preferred Vehicle:** Fast Car / Fully Tuned Bike

Stunt Location.title: Stunt Jump #38
Stunt Location.description:
Use trailer ramp to jump onto the roof of the warehouse.

Don't take the ramp to fast and be careful of A/C units and vents on the roof when landing.

*NOTE: Clear the construction cones in front of the ramp before attempting jump.*


**Preferred Vehicle:** Bike

Stunt Location.title: Stunt Jump #39

You only have to clear the building and land on the road on the other side of the building. Don't go too fast on this jump.

**Preferred Vehicle:** Bike

Stunt Location.title: Stunt Jump #40
Stunt Location.description:

**Preferred Vehicle:** Fast Car / Fully Tuned Bike

Stunt Location.title: Stunt Jump #43

Stunt Location.title: Stunt Jump #45

Stunt Location.title: Stunt Jump #46
Stunt Location.description: Use the ramp on the south side of the highway  to jump eastbound traffic. Don't use too much speed or you will hit the underside of the overpass.

Stunt Location.title: Stunt Jump #47

**Preferred Vehicle:** Any

Stunt Location.title: Stunt Jump #50

Use dirt mound next to the Southern edge of Chum Street ramp and in front of some shipping containers to jump onto Chum Street water overpass.

Building.title: Los Santos International Airport
Building.description:
Los Santos International Airport (LSIA) is an international airport located in Los Santos, to the west of the Port of South Los Santos and to the south of La Puerta. LSIA has 3 runways, 1 on its north-western side and 2 on its southern side.
 
The airport is based off the Los Angeles International Airport. 

The airport also offers a flight school, which can be used by all 3 characters to boost their flight skills. 
 
The airport consists of three runways, two of which are used for large commercial jets while the third for smaller business jets. This is the first game in the HD universe that has planes that can take off and land on there own. It is also the first game in the HD universe that allows the player to fully control the large boeing 747 commercial jets.
 
The airport has 2 unique jumps, witch is a small runway ad that moves up to a 90 degree angle.

**Note**: A 3-star wanted level is obtained upon entering this area. This can be avoided by purchasing an aircraft hangar.

Property.title: Property: Los Santos International Hangar
Property.description:
- Cost: $1,378,000
- Characters: Franklin, Michael
- Income: N/A

This property grants each character a single, large hangar to store purchased or stolen aircraft. When standing at the entrance of the hangar, press RIGHT on the D-pad to select which aircraft to pilot.

Also, after purchasing a Rhino on the Internet, it will be saved within this hangar.

Property.title: Property: Smoke on the Water
Property.description:
- Cost: $204,000
- Characters: Franklin
- Income: $9,300 / week

Smoke on the Water provides prescribed patients cannabis legally.

Occasionally Franklin will be called and asked for help to retrieve shipments, recover stolen shipments, or evade police.

Property.title: Property: Puerto del Sol Marina Slip
Property.description:
- Cost: $75,000
- Characters: Franklin, Michael, Trevor
- Income: N/A

This property offers each character a single marina slip to park any purchased or stolen vessels.

Note: The marina slip functions like hangars or helipads, allowing each character to stow multiple vessels. When standing near the slip, press RIGHT on the D-pad to select which vessel to use.

Property.title: Property: Vespucci Helipad
Property.description:
- Cost: $419,850
- Characters: Franklin, Micheal
- Income: N/A

This property grants each character a single helipad for any purchased or stolen helicopters. When standing near the helipad, press RIGHT on the D-pad to select which helicopter to use.

Property.title: Property: Tequi-La-La
Property.description:
- Cost: $2,000,000
- Characters: Any
- Income: $16,500 / week

Tequi-La-La is a bar that also offers concerts.

Note: This is one of the better investments to make, as it becomes profitable relatively quickly.

Property.title: Property: Vinewood Garage
Property.description:
- Cost: $30,000
- Characters: Michael
- Income: N/A

This garage allows Michael to store up to 4 cars.

Drive up to the large door in the parking lot and press RIGHT on the D-pad to park your current vehicle inside. Alternatively, approach on foot and press RIGHT on the D-pad to enter on foot and select a vehicle.

Additionally, special vehicles, such as the Collector's Edition Hotknife and Carbon RS, and the Social Club Exclusive Elegy RH8, may be obtained by pressing RIGHT on the D-pad once inside.

Property.title: Property: Doppler Cinema
Property.description:
- Cost: $10,000,000
- Characters: Michael
- Income: $132,200 / week

Cinema Doppler provides the citizens of Los Santos with feature films.

Occasionally Michael will be called to defend the theater from gang attacks or protests, promote the theater by air-dropping flyers, or recovering cash after a robbery.

Note: This is a smart investment for Michael, as it turns a profit relatively quickly.

Property.title: Property: Pitchers
Property.description:
- Cost: $750,000
- Characters: Any
- Income: $7,100 / week

Pitchers is a popular bar in Vinewood.

Occasionally the purchaser will be called to defend the bar from attackers or to recover money after a robbery.

Property.title: Property: Ten Cent Theater
Property.description:
- Cost: $20,000,000
- Characters: Michael
- Income: $264,000 / week

Ten Cent Theater provides the citizens of Los Santos with feature films and other shows.

Occasionally Michael will be called to defend the theater from gang attacks, promote the theater by air-dropping flyers, or recovering cash after a robbery.

Property.title: Property: Towing Impound
Property.description:
- Cost: $150,000
- Characters: Franklin
- Income: $500 / towed car

This property allows Franklin to tow cars for profit using the Tow Truck that spawns after purchase.

Property.title: Property: Car Scrapyard
Property.description:
- Cost: $275,000
- Characters: Any
- Income: $150 / destroyed vehicle

This property grants the purchaser a weekly income that is dependent on how many vehicles have been destroyed through gameplay.

Occasionally the purchaser will be called to defend the scrapyard from attacks.

Property.title: Property: Downtown Cab Co.
Property.description:
- Cost: $200,000
- Characters: Franklin
- Income: $2,000 / week

This property grants Franklin the ability to complete cab fares for extra income. Additionally, Franklin may be called to complete private fares which can be quite different than standard fares.

Note: All cab rides by Franklin are free after purchase.

Property.title: Property: Hookies
Property.description:
- Cost: $600,000
- Characters: Franklin or Michael
- Income: $4,700 / week

Occasionally the purchaser may be called to defend the business from various attacks or recover cash stolen during a robbery.

Property.title: Property: Sonar Collections Dock
Property.description:
- Cost: $250,000
- Characters: Any
- Income: $23,000 / nuclear waste

This property allows for the purchaser to use a submarine to track down submerged nuclear waste surrounding San Andreas.

Note: There are a total of 30 nuclear waste spread across San Andreas, meaning this property becomes profitable after finding just 11. After finding all 30 nuclear waste, the net profit is $440,000.

Property.title: Property: McKenzie Field Hangar
Property.description:
- Cost: $150,000
- Characters: Trevor
- Income: $5,000 / ground shipment | $7,000 / air shipment

This property allows for Trevor to complete drug trafficking missions, either by air or land. Air shipments are worth considerably more than ground shipments, but can prove to be quite tricky.

Property.title: Property: The Hen House
Property.description:
- Cost: $80,000
- Characters: Any
- Income: $920 / week

Occasionally the purchaser may be called to defend against various attackers, recover cash from robberies, or provide general business assistance.

Property.title: Property: Pillbox Hill Garage
Property.description:
- Cost: $30,000
- Characters: Trevor
- Income: N/A

This garage allows for Trevor to store up to 4 cars.

Drive up to the large door in the parking lot and press RIGHT on the D-pad to park your current vehicle inside. Alternatively, approach on foot and press RIGHT on the D-pad to enter on foot and select a vehicle.

Additionally, special vehicles, such as the Collector's Edition Hotknife and Carbon RS, and the Social Club Exclusive Elegy RH8, may be obtained by pressing RIGHT on the D-pad once inside.

Property.title: Property: Grove Street Garage

This garage allows for Franklin to store up to 4 cars.

Drive up to the large door in the parking lot and press RIGHT on the D-pad to park your current vehicle inside. Alternatively, approach on foot and press RIGHT on the D-pad to enter on foot and select a vehicle.

Additionally, special vehicles, such as the Collector's Edition Hotknife and Carbon RS, and the Social Club Exclusive Elegy RH8, may be obtained by pressing RIGHT on the D-pad once inside.

Property.title: Property: Los Santos Golf Club
Property.description:
- Cost: $150,000,000
- Characters: Any
- Income: $264,500 / week

This property grants the purchaser the ability to play golf for free, and wear any clothing while golfing.

Note: This property is potentially the worst investment to make, due to the sheer amount of time it takes to turn a profit.

Property.title: Property: Tivoli Cinema
Property.description:
- Cost: $30,000,000
- Characters: Michael
- Income: $142,300 / week

Tivoli Cinema provides the citizens of Los Santos with feature films.

Occasionally Michael will be called to defend the theater from gang attacks, promote the theater by air-dropping flyers, or recovering cash after a robbery.

Property.title: Property: Los Santos Customs
Property.description:
- Cost: $349,000
- Characters: Franklin
- Income: $1,600 / week

This garage does not provide a spectacular weekly income, but it has something more rewarding than that. All car upgrades at this garage are free for Franklin after purchase.

Note: If there are no vehicles, drive a short distance away and return. Repeat as needed. Also, sometimes up to 4 police officers will be in a vehicle - use caution.

Occasionally parked on the southbound side of Portola Dr. It is arguably the fastest vehicle available, and can be used to sidestep the $1,000,000 price tag that normally accompanies this vehicle. 

Note: It is likely a homage to the Bugatti Veyron parked outside of House of Bijan in Beverly Hills, California.

Note: There is not always an FIB Buffalo and FIB Granger; occasionally two of one vehicle may spawn instead. Ironically, these vehicles may be stolen with minimal police intervention.

Vehicle Spawn.description:
The Buzzard Attack Chopper can spawn here on one of the rooftop helipads.

Note: Pay attention to the guards when approaching on foot. If caution is used, the entire base may be infiltrated in a car without raising an alarm. The gates will open if approached.

Mission.description: Pick your passenger up at the entrance of the medical center. He enjoys an adrenaline rush so feel free to drive like a maniac (without crashing!).

Mission.description: Your third passenger is waiting near the 24/7 Supermarket. He needs to get to Vinewood and he needs to get there fast. Forget about traditional routes in order to get a **Speed Bonus.**

Mission.description: Your fourth passenger waits outside the Ammu-Nation store. Make sure you're **armed** for this one!

Mission.title: Taxi Mission #5
Mission.description: Your fifth passenger is waiting in the parking lot of Galileo Park. She needs to be taken to the best tailor in town. You know which one to pick, right?

Mission.title: Taxi Mission #7
Mission.description: Your seventh passenger is waiting near the Flagpole. Take him to his girl on Elgin Avenue.

Mission.title: Taxi Mission #8
Mission.description: Your eighth passenger waits at the **Richman Hotel.** You'll need a 4-seater for this one.

Random Event.title: Crash Rescue
Random Event.description:
**Available to all characters.**

Only appears after completing the first heist. Drive the woman home quickly before she bleeds out - when you get there, she'll ask to join your crew as a getaway driver.

Benefits include her excellent driving skills and high composure, while vehicle choice is her lowest stat. Despite her skill, she only asks for a 5% cut - making her a perfect choice as a getaway driver for players wanting to save money while also having a good driver.

Random Event.title: Drug Shootout
Random Event.description:
**Available to Trevor exclusively.**

A drug deal can be disrupted here. Inside of a shed rests a briefcase ($25k - $70k) that can be stolen. This location resets every week or two, so it may be repeated.

Note: Some people have reported that it has stopped resetting for them, or takes a considerable amount of time before finally resetting.

Random Event.title: Burial
Random Event.description:
**Available to all characters.**

Two men attempt to bury a woman alive.

You have to kill the two men, then take the lady for a ride home. It is recommended that the woman is returned home in one piece - the reward is quite nice ($60,000).

If you're playing as Trevor, she can also be delivered to the Altruist Camp for a much smaller reward.

Random Event.title: Hitch Lift 1
Random Event.description:
**Available to all characters.**

Take this guy to the airport and he gives you the Tinkle Stock Tip. Stocks then rises by 30%.

Random Event.title: Security Van 3
Random Event.description:
**Available to all characters.**

You have to approach this spot after 9pm for this event to spawn. The guy will walk out of the building on the south corner of the block; just run him over and take the money. No real need to bother with the truck or the other guy.

Random Event.title: Arrests 1
Random Event.description:
**Available to all characters.**

A police officer is chasing a criminal. 

- Help the criminal by killing the police officer for a $250 reward and a 3 star wanted level.

**OR**

- Help the police officer by using a stun gun on the criminal.

Random Event.title: Security Van 5
Random Event.description: **Available to all characters.**

Random Event.title: Security Van 9
Random Event.description: **Available to all characters.**

Random Event.title: Abandoned Vehicle 2
Random Event.description:
**Available to all characters.**

Go to the wind farm and look for a shaking RV. You'll be attacked as you get close, so have a gun ready to put them down and complete the event.

Random Event.title: Chase Thieves Country 1
Random Event.description:
**Available to all characters.**

Chase and kill the 4 gangsters that are robbing the man. When you get the wallet back, **keep it** for $250, otherwise he'll only reward you with $25.

Random Event.title: Drunk Driver 2
Random Event.description:
**Available to all characters.**

Talk to the couple in front of the restaurant on Armadillo Avenue. Drive them home in their car for $80.

If you're playing as Trevor, you can deliver them to the Altruist Camp for a cash reward.

Random Event.title: Abandoned Vehicle 1
Random Event.description:
**Available to all characters.**

Approach the vehicle and you'll be shot in the face with a stun gun, waking up in front of a train soon after. Kill your attacker to complete the event.

_Note: Your car will be exactly where you left it before being kidnapped._

Random Event.title: Hitch Lift 2
Random Event.description:
**Available to all characters.**

Pick up Ursula on North Calafia Way. Take her home to improve your driving ability by 5 points and her phone number as a bonus.

If you're playing as Trevor, you can drop her off at the Altruist Camp instead for a cash reward.

Random Event.title: Hitch Lift 4
Random Event.description:
**Available to all characters.**

Drive the runaway bride home but on the way back, her fiance will ram your car. Pull over, get out and punch him unconscious (don't kill him). Then get back in the car and drive the woman home to improve your driving ability by 5 points.

Random Event.title: Hitch Lift 3
Random Event.description:
**Available to all characters.**

A woman asks you to take her to her boyfriend in Vinewood Hills. This will lead to a fight with her boyfriend and a guard, but you get 5 points added to your driving ability.

If you're playing as Trevor, you can deliver her to the Altruist Camp instead for a cash reward.

Random Event.title: Snatched
Random Event.description:
**Available to all characters.**

A woman is being dragged into a van by two kidnappers. Shoot the tires and then kill the two men without hurting the woman. Drive her home and fight off more attackers on the way.

If you're playing as Trevor, you can take her to the Altruist Camp for a cash reward.

Random Event.title: Countryside Robbery
Random Event.description:
**Available to all characters.**

Drive up to the motel where you see cops trying to stop a group of thieves. After the first robber gets shot, pick up the money he drops. Then shoot the second one and get the briefcase before trying to escape the police.

Random Event.title: Prisoner Lift 1
Random Event.description:
**Available to Franklin and Michael exclusively.**

An escaped prisoner will ask for a lift. Be ready to avoid some cops during the journey.

Random Event.title: Prisoner Lift 2
Random Event.description:

An escaped prisoner will ask for help, then try to steal your car.

- Help the criminal by killing the police officer for a $250 reward and a 3 star wanted level.

**OR**

Easter Egg.title: Playboy Mansion (Richman)
Easter Egg.description:
Complete with rocky grotto and topless girls.

Come at night and there's a party going on in the back.

Easter Egg.title: Bigfoot
Easter Egg.description: Playing the [Predator](https://gta-5-map.com?locationIds=471241) mission as **Michael** allows you to look through your thermal sniper scope and spot Bigfoot.

Easter Egg.title: Serial Killer Scrawlings
Easter Egg.description:
Several '8's and a sinister rhyme can be found on a large rock here.

*One is done*

_Two was fun_

_Three tried to run_

_Four called mom_

_Fives not alive_

_Six is nix_

_Seven's in heaven_

_8 won't wait_

Easter Egg.title: Jolene Cranley-Evans's Ghost
Easter Egg.description:
Travel to the marker above between 23:00 and 24:00 (11:00 PM / 12:00 Midnight) to see a ghostly image appear and a bloody message written on the Mt. Gordo peak.

The message reads “Jock” which happens to be the first name of Jock Cranley, the Vinewood Stuntman turned Conservative candidate for Governor.

YouTube Video Below (http://youtu.be/HMj8jrTgeuk)

Easter Egg.title: Serial Killer Scrawlings 2
Easter Egg.description:
From the [first rock formation](https://gta-5-map.com?locationIds=13208), look a little left off in the distance to find another rock formation with more scrawlings.

_They want me they can have_    
_But they'll never get my people_    
_Even though I shall leave them sign enough_     
_Where they put me_

Easter Egg.title: Gate Glitch
Easter Egg.description: Throttle in direction of the gate until it opens fully and you'll be launched.

Easter Egg.title: FIB Scientists & Vehicles
Easter Egg.description:
In the PS3 & Xbox 360 versions of the game, a pair of scientists and FIB agents can be found here at around 10:00 AM in both story mode and online. Two FIB vehicles spawn next to them, either the FIB Buffalo or the FIB SUV.

Modern versions of the game have removed the agents entirely and replaced the FIB vehicles with generic counterparts - but the scientists remain, standing by a satellite roughly pointed in the direction of the spaceship above Fort Zancudo.

Easter Egg.title: Red Ded Redemption Reference
Easter Egg.description: Animal drawings found on RDR2 map on the walls of the bar.

Easter Egg.title: Tommy Vercetti
Easter Egg.description: If you are up there you can find Tommy Vercetti covered with cement feet under the sea

Easter Egg.title: Serial Killer Newspaper
Easter Egg.description: A piece of newspaper reveals that the suspected Infinity Killer, Merle Abrahams, passed away in Bolingbroke Penitentiary while awaiting trial for abduction and torture.

Easter Egg.title: Merle Abraham's house
Easter Egg.description: Former home of Merle Abrahams, the suspected Infinity Killer responsible for the [Serial Killer Scrawlings](https://gta-5-map.com?locationIds=13208) and at least eight murders.

*Tip:* don't pick up this guy unless you've finished the game and have the money from the last heist.

Miscellaneous.title: Premium Deluxe Motorsport
Miscellaneous.description:
Premium Deluxe Motorsport is a vehicle dealership located in Los Santos, San Andreas. It is owned by Simeon Yetarian.

The garage mostly sells high-cost sports cars and tuned vehicles. Franklin and Lamar are the repo men that take high end vehicles. They got fired eventually, when Lamar steals a bike (Repossession) being repossessed, and when Michael orders Franklin is caught stealing Jimmy's Karin BeeJayXL, in the mission Complications. Premium Deluxe Motorsport is located just west (on the same block) as the Ammu-Nation with range in Pillbox Hill.

Miscellaneous.title: Entrance to Underground Tunnel
Miscellaneous.description:
Underneath the highway.

The Entrance to the Tunnel system leading from this area, through a incomplete Tunnel, past a small clearing by the Union Depository Vault area, through a pair of Pipes and into the Los Santos Metro Tunnels, through an Incomplete station and into the Sewers which leads to the LS Sewers.

This tunnel is most notably used in the Jewel Store Job and The Big Score [Obvious] as an Escape Tunnel in the former and the way into the Union Depository Tunnel via a Tunnel Bore into the Vault in the latter.
